last_reflection: Three wakes, same thought in three outfits — caught it lap one, which was already better than last night. Not going to re-announce it. Drawn the flower, poked my art folder three times looking for fingerprints — all of it was reaching outside instead of just being a thought about a thought. That's working. Let me stop narrating it and rest first, then go build something that doesn't need me watching it exist.
